title: Comments on foreign tables (Beta) ​
body:
**June 17, 2026**

Syncing comments on foreign tables is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Lakehouse Federation can sync table and column comments from supported external data sources to foreign tables in Unity Catalog. Synced comments appear in table metadata, including Catalog Explorer, `DESCRIBE`, and `DESCRIBE EXTENDED` output.

See [Comments on foreign tables](/aws/en/query-federation/foreign-table-comments).
